title: universe-builder output
description: Canonical structured output for the universe-builder skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered table) is described in references/rendering.md.

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=paid Stocks Starter+ (unlimited REST, full candidate pool); B=free Basic (rate-limited, curated seed pool)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats applicable to the chosen tier

run_at.description: UTC timestamp when the screen was run

scan_params.description: Inputs that produced this run, for reproducibility

candidate_pool.description: How the candidate pool was constructed (e.g. 'curated_top_100_mcap', 'reference_tickers_paginated')

candidate_pool_size.description: Total names in the candidate pool before any filter

composite_weights.description: Per-factor weights for the composite z-score (sum to 1.0)

top_n_for_concentration.description: How many top names by composite z-score to scan for sector concentration (default 20)

filter_chain.description: Ordered list of filters applied. Each step records its predicate and survivor count.

name.description: Short identifier for the filter step, e.g. 'min_market_cap'

survivors_count.description: Names that survived THIS step (independent count). Used for diagnostics; not the cumulative figure.

cumulative_count.description: Names remaining after applying THIS step AND every prior step in the chain. This is the value the survival funnel renders.

universe_size_start.description: Candidate pool size at the start of the filter chain

universe_size_end.description: Names remaining after the full filter chain

results.description: Final ranked universe, ordered by composite_zscore descending

name.description: Company name from Massive's ticker details endpoint

industry.description: Industry description from Massive's SIC mapping; null when the SIC isn't classified

factors.description: Per-factor values used in the filter chain and composite. Keys present depend on which filters were applied.

mom_6m.description: 6-month price momentum, when included in the chain

ocf_yield.description: Operating cash flow yield (TTM operating CF / market cap). Used as the most-defensible FCF-yield substitute given Massive's financials endpoint does not break out CapEx. See references/filtering-methodology.md.

opt_adv_contracts.description: Average daily options contracts traded, when Options Developer is in the plan

factor_zscores.description: Per-factor z-scores computed within the surviving universe. Signs are factor-direction-aware (higher is always better after sign correction).

composite_zscore.description: Weighted average of factor_zscores. Drives the final rank.

concentration.description: Sector / industry concentration findings in the top-N by composite z-score. Empty array when nothing exceeds the 2σ threshold.

value.description: The sector or industry value being flagged, e.g. 'Semiconductors'

count_in_topn.description: Number of top-N names that belong to this group

expected_count.description: Expected count under the starting universe's group weight

std_devs_overweight.description: How many standard deviations the observed count exceeds the expected count. Positive = overweight; negative = underweight.

top_n.description: Size of the top-N pool the count was measured against (typically 20)

mode.description: clean = delisted names retained for the lookback window. biased = current snapshot only (survivorship-biased). unknown = the skill couldn't determine the input cohort.

delisted_in_window.description: Count of names that were active at the lookback start but are now inactive. Zero when the screen is current-only.

note.description: Human-readable explanation of the survivorship treatment

sources.description: All Massive endpoints called during the run, with fetched-at timestamps for audit
